hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && if [ -f node_modules/vite-plus/bin/vp ]; then exit 0; elif command -v vp >/dev/null 2>&1; then vp install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts && test -f node_modules/vite-plus/bin/vp; else bun install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts && test -f node_modules/vite-plus/bin/vp; fi
